# monarchmoney-cli

> Accounts, transactions, budgets, and cashflow from your terminal.

## Overview

Accounts, transactions, budgets, and cashflow from your terminal.

## Key features

- Monarch Money API access — accounts, transactions, budgets, cashflow
- Versioned JSON envelope output
- Session token authentication
- Single Go binary, no runtime dependencies

## Documentation

- Capabilities: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/monarchmoney-cli/docs/capabilities
- Authentication: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/monarchmoney-cli/docs/auth
- Safety Model: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/monarchmoney-cli/docs/safety
- Agent Guide: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/monarchmoney-cli/docs/agent-guide
- JSON Schema: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/monarchmoney-cli/docs/json-schema
